Surname.jp: 遊び大好き魔王の眷属♪

dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】1階

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to grant the caster increased <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nDeals <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> of the target's Max Health as fixed damage if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、対象の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>の固定ダメージを与える。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 대상 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> 만큼 고정 피해를 입힙니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则造成相当于目标生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>的固定伤害。

description.en: Attacks all enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases when the caster is granted increased <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>がUPした状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.\n자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 증가한 상태라면 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n若自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>处于提升状态,则使伤害提升。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. Damage dealt greatly increases when the caster is granted increased <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color>, and when the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>, deals <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of the target's Max Health as fixed damage. After using this skill, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant increased <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>がUPした状態の場合、ダメージが大幅にUPし、対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、対象の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>の固定ダメージを与える。スキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で自分の <color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせ、対象に<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다. 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 증가한 상태라면 피해가 크게 증가하고, 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 대상 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 만큼 고정 피해를 입힙니다. 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가하고, 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。若自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>处于提升状态,则使伤害大幅提升,且若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则造成相当于目标生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>的固定伤害。使用技能后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
At the start of battle, grants an irremovable <color=#28d9ed>reduced damage taken</color> effect to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
At the start of the turn, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on a random enemy that ignores <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
At the end of the caster's turn, recovers Weakness Gauge by 5.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
戦闘開始時、自分に解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>ダメージDOWN</color>効果を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与する。
ターン開始時、ランダムな敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>および<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を無視する<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
自分のターン終了時、WGを5回復する。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
전투 시작 시 자신에게 해제되지 않는 <color=#28d9ed>피해 감소</color> 효과를 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
턴 시작 시 무작위 적 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color> 및 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 무시하는 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
자신의 턴 종료 시 WG를 5 회복합니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果)
战斗开始时,自身获得无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>伤害降低</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。
回合开始时,对随机1名敌人造成无视<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>和<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>的<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
自身回合结束时,WG恢复5。
